General.Name: WT Group Holdings
General.Description: WT Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the business of specialized works and general building works in Hong Kong. The company undertakes specialized works, including foundation and site formation works, demolition works, and ground investigation field works. The company also carries out general building works, such as superstructure building works, slope maintenance works, hoarding works, alteration and addition works, and other miscellaneous renovation and construction works. WT Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Tai Kok Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Evernew Commercial Centre, Tai Kok Tsui, Hong Kong
